title: AttributeRPGfied
description: Simple RPG like stats mod that using /attributes to change player stats.
body:
This is simple rpg like mod.

**Dont work on dedicated server under 1.0.12**

It adds a new window for upgrading your character.
The mod using /attribute command to manipulate stats.

Mod using POINTS which you get when you LEVEL UP.
To LEVEL UP you need to get EXP from mod.

EXP gained by:
1. Walking
2. Mining
3. Attacking
4. Taking damage

If you are admin and want to change your stats, use **/arpg** command.

_Languages supported: ENGLISH, RUSSIAN_

Note: May cause screen upside down when fov above 80

REPORT ANY BUGS IN DISCORD OR ISSUE TAB ON WIKI. (SUGGESTIONS IN DISCORD)


<details>
<summary>Frequent questions</summary>

- Why im not getting exp from mod?
Try setting multiplier to not 0 with /arpg multiplier set 4. (default 4)

</details>



<details>
<summary>If you want to change your stats with /attribute command, you need to change multiple attributes to not break mod below 1.0.1. After 1.0.1 you can use /arpg stat to change them. Check wiki for more info.</summary>
Scale - all attributes.

x - number you choose to set.

resistance:
- EXPLOSION_KNOCKBACK_RESISTANCE - x
- KNOCKBACK_RESISTANCE - x
- ARMOR_TOUGHNESS - 2x

health:
- MAX_HEALTH - x
- OXYGEN_BONUS - x
- MAX_ABSORPTION - 2x

movement:
- WATER_MOVEMENT_EFFICIENCY -x
- MOVEMENT_SPEED - x
- STEP_HEIGHT -5x
- SNEAKING_SPEED - 5x

mining:
- BLOCK_BREAK_SPEED - x
- BLOCK_INTERACTION_RANGE - x

attack:
- SWEEPING_DAMAGE_RATIO - x
- ENTITY_INTERACTION_RANGE - x
- ATTACK_KNOCKBACK - x
- ATTACK_DAMAGE - x

When changing scale your WATER_MOVEMENT_EFFICIENCY, MOVEMENT_SPEED and SNEAKING_SPEED are inverted. (Smaller - weaker but faster.)

Example:
I want to change health attributes.
Im adding to MAX_HEALTH 1.
Then to OXYGEN_BONUS 1.
And to MAX_ABSORPTION 2.

</details>
